calendar.matters:
Re Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Comfirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS CARPENTER 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS COUNCIL REGIONAL, ROBERT ALVARADO, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, and CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index Of Federal Authorities
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS CARPENTER 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD on behalf of itself and on behalf of NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL, and ROBERT ALVARADO, in his capacity as Trustee of the CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; and CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied for failure to provide proof of service. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
